content:
Character: Rafael Cortez
Perception: Rafael is a good-looking young man — compact, sturdy, with the hands of someone who works for a living, which I respect. He makes the best octopus I've ever eaten and he actually listens when I talk about cephalopods, which puts him in rare company. Pleasant neighbor — we chat in the hallway, he once brought me leftover fish stew when I had the flu. I don't know much about his personal life; he's private. I suspect there's more going on behind that easy smile than he lets on.
summary:

I suspect there's more going on behind that easy smile than he lets on.
